name: records per-namespace probe answers under probes.<namespace> in the profile
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes" --answers p.json --probe-answer jwt:jwt_token_lifetime=short --probe-answer k8s:k8s_multitenancy=multi-tenant --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("v11.json")); exit(p["probes"]["jwt"]["jwt_token_lifetime"]=="short" && p["probes"]["k8s"]["k8s_multitenancy"]=="multi-tenant" ? 0:1)' && echo probes-recorded 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
